title: CSS Shorthand Properties Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on modern CSS development strategies and features.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using CSS shorthand properties?
options: They make the CSS file larger for better reading.
They allow setting multiple related CSS properties in one line.
They only work in mobile browsers.
They are required for all animations.

questions.question: What is the correct clockwise order for setting margin or padding shorthands?
If you write 'margin: 10px 20px 30px;', what is the margin-left value?
questions.comment: When three values are specified, the first is top, the second is left and right, and the third is bottom. So left/right is 20px.

questions.question: Which of these is a valid shorthand for a border?
What happens if a sub-property is omitted in a shorthand property declaration?
options: It inherits the value from its parent element.
It is reset to its default CSS value.
The browser ignores the entire shorthand declaration.
It retains its previously defined value.
